YUWANCARD-显示设置.title: Display Settings
YUWANCARD-ENABLE_DEATH_EFFECT.title: Enable Death Effect
YUWANCARD-ENABLE_DEATH_EFFECT.hover.desc: Play death effect when creatures are killed.
YUWANCARD-多人游戏设置.title: Multiplayer Settings
YUWANCARD-BYPASS_MODEL_DB_HASH_CHECK.hov: Allow players with different ModelDb hashes to connect. Warning: May cause game sync issues, ensure all players have the same mods.
YUWANCARD-更新设置.title: Update Settings
YUWANCARD-ENABLE_AUTO_UPDATE_CHECK.title: Enable Auto Update Check
YUWANCARD-ENABLE_AUTO_UPDATE_CHECK.hover: Automatically check for mod updates when the game starts.
YUWANCARD-UPDATE_POPUP.title: YuWanCard Update Available
